creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=0e09699300d49bbd304b5be47462ef3b615202c3> noted with thanks, 

> graphics/drm-devel-kmod: Update to v5.5
> 
> This bring us in sync with Linux 5.5 drm drivers.

This part of the package description is slightly outdated: 

> Currently corresponding to Linux 5.4.92 DRM.
